title: OpenYSM
description: A mod that modifies the vanilla player model
body:
Open-source alternative for Yes Steve Model

[https://github.com/OpenYSM/OpenYSM](https://github.com/OpenYSM/OpenYSM)

OpenYSM is a player model modification mod that provides the same functionality as YSM.

This solves the compatibility issues of YSM, as this mod is compatible with almost all platforms, including macOS, RISC-V, and even mobile phones.

### MacOS
